languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

languages.text: "Я разочарован твоими коммуникационными способностями. Однако у тебя все еще есть возможность ответить на мой вопрос".

traits.locale_text: "Я разочарован твоими коммуникационными способностями. Однако у тебя все еще есть возможность ответить на мой вопрос".

languages.text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

"I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

languages.text: “你的沟通能力让我失望。不过，你还有机会回答我的问题。”
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: “你的沟通能力让我失望。不过，你还有机会回答我的问题。”

languages.text: «Me decepcionan tus capacidades de comunicación. Sin embargo, aún tienes la oportunidad de responder a mi pregunta».
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: «Me decepcionan tus capacidades de comunicación. Sin embargo, aún tienes la oportunidad de responder a mi pregunta».

languages.text: « Votre capacité à communiquer laisse à désirer. Cependant, je suis prêt à vous donner une nouvelle chance de me répondre. »
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: « Votre capacité à communiquer laisse à désirer. Cependant, je suis prêt à vous donner une nouvelle chance de me répondre. »

languages.text: "İletişim becerilerin beni hayal kırıklığına uğrattı. Ancak yine de soruma cevap verme şansın var."
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: "İletişim becerilerin beni hayal kırıklığına uğrattı. Ancak yine de soruma cevap verme şansın var."

languages.text: "Dein kommunikativen Fähigkeiten enttäuschen mich. Du hast allerdings immer noch die Chance, meine Frage zu beantworten."
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: "Dein kommunikativen Fähigkeiten enttäuschen mich. Du hast allerdings immer noch die Chance, meine Frage zu beantworten."

languages.text: 「お前のコミュニケーション能力には失望させられる。とはいえ、私の問いに答える機会は、まだお前に残されている」
languages.original_text: "I find myself disappointed in your communication abilities. However, you still have the chance to answer my question."

traits.locale_text: 「お前のコミュニケーション能力には失望させられる。とはいえ、私の問いに答える機会は、まだお前に残されている」
